name: mos-tools
description: Codex skills for the local mosaic CLI, exposed as $adv-xxx commands.

interface.shortDescription: Use local mosaic reviews, critiques, vision, SOTA research, config, and gates from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Mos Tools exposes the local mosaic CLI through Codex skills named mos-review, mos-critique, mos-plan, mos-vision, mos-sota, mos-config, mos-doctor, and mos-gate. The SOTA skill supports normal/deep research profiles, with normal as the default, and writes summary.json with source health and quality buckets. The plugin is a lightweight Codex facade; mosaic itself never launches Codex.
defaultPrompt: Run $mos-doctor to check mosaic/plugin readiness before using external mosaics.
Run $mos-review on this implementation plan with relevant files.
Run $mos-critique on this diff and classify blockers vs improvements.
Run $mos-sota to research the latest source-backed state of a domain.
